nasb.text: Then Jacob awoke from his sleep and said, “Surely the Lord is in this place, and I did not know it.”

esv.text: Then Jacob awoke from his sleep and said, “Surely the Lord is in this place, and I did not know it.”

cnv.text: 雅各一覺醒來，說：“耶和華確實在這地方，我竟不知道！”

ccb.text: 雅各一觉醒来，说：“耶和华居然在这里，我却不知道。”

csbs.text: 雅各从睡眠中醒过来，说：“耶和华确实在这地方，我竟然不知道！”
